title: Match Word to Image: Wrong-answer red X overlay + auto-reset for unlimited retries

requirements.text: Update the Match Word to Image gameplay wrong-answer feedback so that selecting an incorrect option shows the same large red X overlay style used in Choose Correct Image (semi-transparent red overlay with a large red X icon centered), covering only the specific selected option block (not the entire row), and then automatically clears after a short delay to allow unlimited tries on the same question.

quotes: when selecting the wrong option on the Match Word to Image Game, it must use a nice red big X over the whole option block, use the same design from the Choose Correct Image game as i like how that one looks when choosing the wrong option.

1. yes
2. only the specific option
3. dissapear so that it also allows unlimited tries

acceptanceCriteria: In MatchWordToImageGame, when the user selects an incorrect option, only that option renders a full-cover overlay matching ChooseCorrectImageGame’s incorrect state (red translucent overlay + large centered X icon).
The incorrect feedback automatically disappears after ~800ms (same delay as ChooseCorrectImageGame) and the user can immediately try again on the same question without pressing Next.
After an incorrect selection resets, all options return to the idle visual state and are clickable again.
Correct-selection behavior remains unchanged: correct option indicates success and enables proceeding to the next question.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (shadcn UI components are read-only).
Keep changes limited to the existing React + Tailwind implementation; do not introduce new frameworks or backend dependencies.
nonGoals: Do not change backend Motoko logic or data schemas.
Do not add scoring, attempt limits, or new gameplay modes.
